name: Roast Pork in Cumin Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Sprinkle cumin over the pork and roast, uncovered, in a 325 F oven for 2.5 hours.
For the sauce:
1/2 tsp Ground pepper
1 tsp Celery seed (or lovage)
1/2 tsp Cumin
1/4 tsp Fennel
1/2 tsp White wine vinegar
1 caraway seed
1/4 cup Pine nuts or almonds, chopped
1/4 cup Dates, chopped
1 tbsp Honey
1 1/2 cups Beef stock or Prok stock
1/8 tsp Ground mustard
2 tbsp Olive oil
Combine all sauce ingredients in a mortar. Grind the pepper, celery seed, cumin, and fennel together.
Add vinegar and mix well.
Stir in caraway, nuts, dates, honey, seasoned stock, and olive oil. Bring to a boil.
Add pork juices from the roasting pan and simmer for 20 minutes.
Thicken with flour if desired.
Serve with a sprinkling of pepper.
